creator: bergerkos@yahoo.co.uk
text:
Please, how could I used your solution? I'm having the same problem with OpenBSD running in VM. And I'm sure it's edk2 and not bhyve itself responsible. Because I downgraded to 13.2 to test if the problem would not go away -- and it didn't. But downgrading the edk2 port is a bit of trouble... I'll check that option as well, though.
BTW, Windows VM runs fine, no problems at all.
